calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 09:20am

Judge Pro Tem Deborah Daniloff, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Amanda King, appears with Counsel Krista L. Shoquist. Respondent, RRAZZ Entertainment West, Inc., represented by owners Robert Kotonly and Rory Paul appear in Pro Per.Parties, previously sworn, testify in narrative and respond to questions from Judge Daniloff.

EXHA: (1) Trial Brief Binder,
EXHR: (A) Contract with the Appellant, Amanda King; (B) Email between RRAZZ Ent. and King; (C) Email between RRAZZ Ent. and King; (D) Entity Status Report.

10:17am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
